roles.core: central bot, finance, licenses, reseller type upgrades, central APIs and D1 authority
roles.edge: all web pages, reseller bots, customer miniapps and reseller management
roles.processor: scheduled reseller automation, retry queue and background jobs; Telegram webhooks are processed directly by Edge

fixes: add owner-facing reseller bot type change and upgrade flow in the central Telegram bot
upgrade store bots to master by charging only the configured setup-fee difference
synchronize the connected PasarGuard manager role with the selected bot type
preserve customers, orders, plans, balances, texts and settings during type changes
prevent master-to-store downgrade while child reseller bots still exist
release channel announcement contains only version 2.9.9 changes

financial_rules.store_to_master: charge max(0, master setup fee - store setup fee)
financial_rules.failed_role_or_database_change: automatic wallet and PasarGuard role rollback
